plugins.name: whitepaper
plugins.description: Technical whitepaper authoring plugin — guides users through creating high-quality whitepapers with structured workflows, research, review, and PDF generation.

plugins.name: top-10
plugins.description: Competitive research plugin — identifies top 10 solutions in any market, deep-dives each, and generates a comprehensive PRD from the findings.

plugins.name: test-everything
plugins.description: Comprehensive testing toolkit — audit coverage gaps, plan testing strategies, scaffold test infrastructure, and review test quality across all testing layers.

plugins.name: bo-planner
plugins.description: File-based planning with scope fences, environment snapshots, verification gates, and subagent delegation tracking. Produces structured artifacts in docs/planning/.

plugins.name: article-writer
plugins.description: Article writing plugin — 6-stage pipeline (research, outline, draft, style critique, content critique, final edit) with voice profiles, 42 built-in templates, 4 research depth levels, series support, and ideas tracking.

plugins.name: incident-postmortem
plugins.description: Incident postmortem builder — intake artifacts (logs, chat threads, screenshots, configs, monitoring data) and produce structured 8-section postmortems with gap detection and parallel artifact analysis.

plugins.name: standard-design
plugins.description: Standard Design System plugin — apply, review, and scaffold React + MUI admin interfaces with dual-mode theming, 28 component overrides, design tokens, and 4 page patterns.

plugins.name: enterprise-assessment
plugins.description: Enterprise readiness evaluator — 12-category assessment with risk-scored findings, compliance framework mapping (NIST, SOC2, ISO 27001), assessment profiles, and executive-ready reports.

plugins.name: adversarial-consensus
plugins.description: Multi-agent adversarial debate — spawns domain-expert personas to stress-test implementation plans through structured rounds until consensus emerges. 170 personas across 16 domains.
